title: L62 - work_factory_services
description: Service packaging of capabilities (L61). Each service is a concrete, invocable implementation that delivers one or more capabilities. Services are registered by agents/cp_agents and can be invoked via service requests (L63). Services have defined SLAs (L66) and performance tracking (L65).

description.description: Detailed description of service functionality, use cases, and value

required_capability_ids.description: FK array to L61 work_factory_capabilities (RESTRICT on delete). Capabilities this service MUST provide.

optional_capability_ids.description: FK array to L61 (RESTRICT on delete). Additional capabilities this service MAY provide (depends on configuration/context).

input_schema.description: JSON schema defining valid service inputs (embedded or FK to L21 schemas)

provider_type.description: What type of provider implements this service (polymorphic)

provider_id.description: Polymorphic FK to provider (agent/cp_agent/persona) or external system identifier

endpoint_url.description: HTTP endpoint for service invocation (nullable if not HTTP-based)

authentication_method.description: How callers authenticate to this service

availability_sla_ref.description: FK to L66 work_service_level_objectives. Primary availability SLA for this service.

performance_profile_ref.description: FK to L65 work_service_perf_profiles. Current performance profile for this service.

deployment_target.description: Where this service is deployed (Azure Function, Container App, local process, etc.)

deprecation_reason.description: Why this service was deprecated (if status=deprecated)

replacement_service_id.description: FK to L62 (self-reference). If deprecated, which service replaced this one.

notes.description: Additional operational notes or configuration details
